Any Special Requests: Quiet safe area as I work from home. I'm a non-smoker leaving my current apartment of the last 18 years (The Place at Greenway) due to new neighbors on 2 sides drug use and smoking, with the smoke entering my apartment and the management not caring. Needs to be a gated apartment with a pool that is at least 7 feet deep at one end for exercise. It needs to have in unit washer/dryer. I do not want a high-rise complex and do not want a 1st floor unit. I prefer top floor, but if 4th floor then it must have an elevator. I prefer carpet in living area and bedroom. Prefer a smaller 1 bedroom apartment. Looking for rent of $1000 to $1250/month, with total rent after fees $1300 or less if possible. I do not have pets and prefer a place that doesn't allow large dogs.
AI SMS Reply:
Great question! Most apartments know their availability 60 days out, so starting your search early gives you more choices and time to compare. That said, the best pricing and up-to-date options usually appear within 30–45 days before your move.

Would you like to check out the earliest available showings now, or would you prefer to wait a bit closer to your preferred move-in date?
Message History: CONTACT:  Hey J, thanks for reaching out. Would prefer April 23rd, but could probably do the 25th if needed.CONTACT:  In your opinion is it better to look earlier like now, or only several weeks before moving?
